injuries.comment: The Sabres said on Wednesday (Sept. 17) that Greenway underwent another core surgery in mid-July and will likely miss most of training camp, per Mike Harrington of The Buffalo News.
The Sabres reported on Wednesday (Sept. 17) that Luukkonen is dealing with a lower-body injury and currently considered day to day, per Buffalo General Manager Kevyn Adams.
The Sabres said on Wednesday (Sept. 17) that Tuch is day-to-day with an undisclosed injury, per Paul Hamilton of WGR Sports.
